chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-579 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 10.11.2016. None present for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Abbas Memon, State Counsel. = Petitioner and his Counsel are called absent. Learned State Counsel has already filed his comments, wherein it is mentioned that a Civil Suit No.36 of 2016 is pending before the learned Senior Civil Judge, Shahdadpur in respect of a dispute of land between private respondents and petitioner. This petition is disposed of with the directions that police officials will ensure that no harassment is caused to the petitioner and private respondents, if have any grievance, the same shall be agitated through due process of law but they are restrained from causing any harassment to the petitioner. JUDGE Shahid
